---
title: "Writing"
description: "Notes on research software engineering, notebooks, tooling, and reproducible scientific workflows."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents: 
    - "posts/[0-9]*/*.qmd"
    - "posts/[0-9]*/*.md"
    - "posts/listing-*/listing-*.qmd"
  
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  max-description-length: 125
title-block-banner: true
---

I write about research software engineering, notebook-driven development,
R/Python tooling, and the systems work that helps scientific projects stay
reproducible after the first prototype.
